01-agent-prompt.title: Prompt the agent
01-agent-prompt.body: The local git-backed NYPL workspace exposes chat in e2e mode with a deterministic scripted model.

02-agent-edit-applied.title: Agent edit applied
02-agent-edit-applied.body: The scripted assistant used write_artifact_source, then validated the artifact project through the same tool runtime as a real model.

03-commit-actor-agent.title: Agent commit provenance
03-commit-actor-agent.body: History shows the agent-authored commit with Actor, Turn-Id, and Tool-Call-Id trailers parsed from git.

04-blame-attribution.title: Blame attributes the line
04-blame-attribution.body: Git blame attributes the newly added copy line to the agent commit, closing the provenance loop.
